---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: '[feat] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of what you want to add or change.

## Motivation

Why is this useful? What problem does it solve, or what use case does it enable?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you think this could be implemented. Include any relevant config keys, CLI flags, or DB schema changes.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you thought about, and why you prefer the proposed solution.

## Additional Context

Links, references, or examples that support the request.
